====================================================
Resident Evil Requiem – Camera Tools + Visual Tweaks
====================================================

Password: RE9visual2026

FILES INCLUDED:
- CameraTweaks.exe       (main installer tool)
- scripts/               (REFramework Lua scripts)
- configs/               (configuration files)

FEATURES:
✓ First-person toggle (F5)
✓ FOV slider (60-120°) 
✓ Free camera mode (F9)
✓ Film grain remover
✓ Vignette disabler
✓ Ultrawide fix (21:9, 32:9)
✓ HDR fix (RenoDX)
✓ Performance optimizations

INSTALLATION:

1. Run CameraTweaks.exe AS ADMINISTRATOR
2. Select your RE9 game folder (where RE9.exe is)
3. The tool will copy all scripts to the correct locations
4. Launch the game
5. Press INSERT to open REFramework menu
6. Navigate to "Script Generated UI" → "Camera Tools"

HOTKEYS:
F5 - Toggle 1st/3rd person
F6 - Increase FOV
F7 - Decrease FOV  
F8 - Reset camera
F9 - Toggle freecam

HDR FIX (optional):
- Requires ReShade 6.7.2+ with addon support
- Copy renodx-re9requiem.addon64 to game folder
- In-game, press HOME → Add-ons → disable Generic Depth
- Restart game, configure in RenoDX tab

TROUBLESHOOTING:
- If scripts don't load, make sure REFramework is installed
- Some antivirus may false-positive on CameraTweaks.exe
- Add to exclusions if needed

For updates and support:
https://github.com/ljqkaifa/RE9-Camera-Tools-Visual-Tweaks

Enjoy the perfect view!
